risk_title: Project Implementation Halted Due to Political Instability and Government Collapse
risk_summary: The project cannot be effectively implemented following the Taliban takeover of Afghanistan on August 15, 2021. The World Bank management decided to cancel ARTF funds based on the extraordinary situation in the country, indicating a complete breakdown in implementation capacity.
evidence_quote: This report documents the World Bank management's decision to cancel ARTF funds in the project based on the consideration that the project cannot be effectively implemented under the current extraordinary situation in Afghanistan.

risk_title: Deterioration in Project Results Following Political Instability
risk_summary: Project performance indicators deteriorated after August 15, 2021, when the Taliban took control. Implementation continued only until this date across all three counterpart agencies (Ministry of Finance, National Procurement Authority, Supreme Audit Office), indicating cessation of effective government engagement.
evidence_quote: Despite some deterioration in the dynamics of results indicators following the MTR mission, the implementation continued to progress in all three counterpart agencies until August 15, 2021.

risk_title: Communication Breakdown with Provincial Government Structures
risk_summary: Implementation of provincial budgeting policy was affected by limitations in communication with provinces, indicating governance fragility and difficulty in coordinating with sub-national authorities.
evidence_quote: However, the implementation of the policy was still affected by the limitations for communication with provinces.

risk_title: Institutional Capacity Loss in Government Counterpart Agencies
risk_summary: The project's core objective of reducing reliance on long-term technical assistants remained significantly off-track, with 492 NTAs still in place against a target of 250, indicating fragile institutional capacity in the Ministry of Finance and partner agencies that cannot sustain reforms independently.
evidence_quote: Despite partial progress the indicator remained off-track significantly exceeding the third year target of 350 NTAs.
